name: pantheon
description: One install, everything: 13 mythically-named core disciplines that auto-route from plain language and announce their plan, PLUS 170+ skills merged from superpowers, ponytail, oh-my-claudecode, and ui-skills (each attributed, licenses retained). Orient, map, research, build, craft UI, test-first, debug, decompose (RLM), review, land, simplify, document, remember — configurable (full / economy / quiet), zero dependencies.
